sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check new position
for n in current_frame.segmentation['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'b' and n['pixels'] == 24:
        print(f"Blue block: boundary={n['boundary']}")

# Check surrounding ascii
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
for r in range(19, 32):
    row_str = ascii_lines[r][12:30]
    if 'b' in row_str or 'W' in row_str:
        print(f"Row {r}: {row_str}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
